## Continuous-Improvement Delegation

The debrief report is now available at `debrief-and-document/report.md`. The following urgent improvement items should be prioritized in the continuous-improvement assignment:

1. **Create `scripts/setup-github-project.py`** — Reusable GitHub Projects V2 setup helper to eliminate the GraphQL schema discovery friction from `init-existing-repository`
2. **Update `create-agents-md-file` assignment** — Add explicit augment-vs-replace guidance for repos with existing AGENTS.md content
3. **Add CI/CD workflow** — GitHub Actions pipeline running pytest + ruff on every push to enforce quality gate before merge
